methods.description: Describes the gravimetric pollen sampling and counting method used from 1999 to 2000 in Vinnitsa city.

steps.description: Pollen counts from 1999 to 2000 were obtained by gravimetric sampling with three Durham traps placed on roofs in different districts of Vinnitsa city.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain pollen counts using gravimetric sampling with Durham traps

steps.description: Samples were taken from March 1 until October 31 in all the years when the study was conducted.
The pollen count was performed by the reading of a 3.24 cm 2 area (the total area of the coverslip) after pollen acetolysis in the years 1999-2000
steps.searchable_summary: perform pollen acetolysis and count pollen grains in a defined area

steps.description: The pollen quantity per cm 2 , average for the three sites, was used in the years 1999-2000.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate average pollen quantity per area across multiple sites
inputs: pollen counts per area (1999-2000) from 3 sites

methods.description: Describes the volumetric pollen sampling and counting method used from 2009 to 2014 in Vinnitsa city.

steps.description: The pollen collection was done by volumetric sampling employing a Burkard trap placed at a height of 25 meters above the ground on the roof of the Vinnitsa National Medical University building in the years 2009-2014.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen using volumetric sampling with a Burkard trap

steps.description: Samples were taken from March 1 until October 31 in all the years when the study was conducted.
The pollen count was performed... by the three horizontal transect method in the years 2009-2011
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen grains using the three horizontal transect method (2009-2011)

steps.description: The pollen count was performed... by the twelve vertical transect method in the years 2012-2014.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen grains using the twelve vertical transect method (2012-2014)

steps.description: The mean daily pollen count data was used for analyses of the airborne pollen spectrum in the years 2009-2014.

methods.description: Describes the methods used to identify collected pollen grains.

steps.description: Pollen grains were identified using the pollen reference slides of Ukraine
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen grains using reference slides

steps.description: Pollen grains were identified using... the pollen identification key program [9]
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen grains using an identification key program

steps.description: Pollen grains were identified using... the pollen atlas edited by the American National Aerobiology Bureau [10].
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen grains using a pollen atlas

methods.description: Describes the process of analyzing seasonal allergy symptoms using patient medical records from specific clinics.

steps.description: Symptoms of seasonal allergy were analyzed by reviewing the medical records from allergy clinics at the Vinnitsa Regional Clinical Children Hospital and at Vinnitsa Municipal Hospital Number 1, Vinnitsa, Ukraine.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain medical records from allergy clinics

steps.description: Records of 38 patients aged from 3 to 16 were reviewed with 20 selected for further analysis from among the children admitted from 2004 to 2013.
steps.searchable_summary: review and select pediatric patient records based on age and admission period

steps.description: Thirty-eight patients aged 18 to 45 were selected for analysis in the Municipal Hospital as well.
steps.searchable_summary: select adult patient records based on age

steps.description: Symptoms of seasonal allergy were analyzed by reviewing the medical records...
steps.searchable_summary: analyze seasonal allergy symptoms from selected medical records

methods.description: Describes the analysis of results from prick tests for inhalant pollen grains conducted using specific extracts.

steps.description: Prick tests for inhalant pollen grains were done using extracts made in Ukraine.
steps.searchable_summary: perform prick tests using specific pollen extracts

steps.description: The results of 50 separate clinical tests of children and 38 tests of adults in the study group were analyzed.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze prick test results for children and adults
